predictions.forecast_value: closer to 3% than the 2% policy target
predictions.source_quote: We see inflation staying closer to 3% in the new regime than policy targets.

predictions.forecast_value: policy rates higher for longer than markets expect; settle well above pre-pandemic norms

predictions.forecast_value: approximately equal odds of moving in either direction; neutral stance
predictions.source_quote: We now see about equal odds that long-term yields swing in either direction.
We see stronger growth helping earnings top expectations. Stock buybacks and other shareholder-friendly actions are positives.
